message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Well-maintained frame and components. Asking $85. Happy to answer questions about condition and maintenance history.
Hey everyone! 👋 Listing my Ninja blender – 900W, works like a dream, only 2 years old. Asking $45. Great for smoothies, soups, you name it. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for a basic tool set for home repairs or a printer with wireless capability. Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Ninja blender. Offering $45.
Still monitoring for tool sets and wireless printers.
Listing: Box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks, classic authors. Well-curated collection in good condition. Asking $20.

Hi Luna! Interested in the sci-fi paperbacks. I'll take them at your asking price of $20. Great collection!
Patiently looking for tool sets and printers.

Howdy, folks. Got a solid Basic tool set here—hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. Well-maintained and ready to work. Asking $50. These tools don't quit.
